use_codes.desc: MITOSOL IS AN ANTIMETABOLITE INDICATED AS AN ADJUNCT TO AB EXTERNO GLAUCOMA SURGERY. IT IS INTENDED FOR TOPICAL APPLICATION TO THE SITE OF GLAUCOMA FILTRATION SURGERY
